'''âz-b-b-m''' ('''kazabemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:veganify|veganify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-b-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veganify|veganify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-b-b-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazabemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizabemoko|thizabemoko]] || [[word:jizabemoko|jizabemoko]] || [[word:shizabemoko|shizabemoko]] || [[word:kizabemoko|kizabemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzabemoko|thuthuzabemoko]] || [[word:jujuzabemoko|jujuzabemoko]] || [[word:shushuzabemoko|shushuzabemoko]] || [[word:kukuzabemoko|kukuzabemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzabemoko|thuzabemoko]] || [[word:juzabemoko|juzabemoko]] || [[word:shuzabemoko|shuzabemoko]] || [[word:kuzabemoko|kuzabemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzabemoko|thuzabemoko]] || [[word:juzabemoko|juzabemoko]] || [[word:shuzabemoko|shuzabemoko]] || [[word:kuzabemoko|kuzabemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozabemoko|thothozabemoko]] || [[word:jojozabemoko|jojozabemoko]] || [[word:shoshozabemoko|shoshozabemoko]] || [[word:kokozabemoko|kokozabemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozabemoko|thozabemoko]] || [[word:jozabemoko|jozabemoko]] || [[word:shozabemoko|shozabemoko]] || [[word:kozabemoko|kozabemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozabemoko|thozabemoko]] || [[word:jozabemoko|jozabemoko]] || [[word:shozabemoko|shozabemoko]] || [[word:kozabemoko|kozabemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzabemoko|thĂŠzabemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzabemoko|jĂŠzabemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzabemoko|shĂŠzabemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzabemoko|kĂŠzabemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazabemoko|thathazabemoko]] || [[word:jajazabemoko|jajazabemoko]] || [[word:shashazabemoko|shashazabemoko]] || [[word:kakazabemoko|kakazabemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazabemoko|thazabemoko]] || [[word:jazabemoko|jazabemoko]] || [[word:shazabemoko|shazabemoko]] || [[word:kazabemoko|kazabemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazabemoko|thazabemoko]] || [[word:jazabemoko|jazabemoko]] || [[word:shazabemoko|shazabemoko]] || [[word:kazabemoko|kazabemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
